title: Peek
description: A Fabric mod that provides additional information about items and blocks
body:
A Fabric mod that provides additional information about items and blocks.
Can be used client-side only.

## Optional Dependencies

- [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [ClothConfig](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

## Features

**Shulker box hints** ([More information](https://modrepo.de/minecraft/peek/wiki/shulker_box_hints))

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14d83b930ef3b4d775c8c46f28716b5073dc9b2c.png)


**Shulker box contents**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75a8484fa8f4f2404ae45d98eab6b187cfe800f.png)

**Amount of bees in a bee nest**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1aacf36761a0a13cd654535046da4310c6af072d.png)


**Locations of markers on explorer maps**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e78770e208cc2ee8f1078475c0eee21c6a7d0d44.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0e58dcb6dbaaf97204005cfafa547d15b538c69.png)


**Destinations of compasses**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bc62cc82cb881da7e645cd32cdd0e1268af74a8.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/831a13c338b18084c28033557b069d209e03e346.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bab3f0fa132e1cc593937a19215c62b79a1469bb.png)


**Death locations of recovery compasses**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bab3f0fa132e1cc593937a19215c62b79a1469bb.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/205502ddd047c19d19e23b8aedeef5dba10bbbb8.png)


**Effects of suspicious stews**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ea1c2ecef4d3b56a2112d7e567c7739877639fb.png)

**Configurable bundle tooltip**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b40eff0859bc263dad5eaf31d918de6f935f70b.png)

**Pick-blocked containers**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a53740e26616ab70c6ad74cafef1b9cf09773e37.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e639e821ba04e3fd4184604521e08f3097bcd4d.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6aaba7bfc7d09f6e60d4ff476990268fdc40a4fb.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c491603ace9783dc22be5ca33ceb80ac547e9118.png)

**Fully configurable with [ModMenu](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modmenu) and [ClothConfig](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config)**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/710ea860876606bb1993340fb1ea97776e7c1ffd.png)
